# DataDetector.Match.SemanticDetails.PhoneNumber

**Structure**

A match that the data detector determines represents a phone number.

## Declaration

```swift
struct PhoneNumber
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.datadetection/documentation/DataDetection/DataDetector/Match/SemanticDetails/PhoneNumber/phoneNumber] property contains the phone number the data detector found. It may contain an extension, such as a passcode or an office extension. The [doc://com.apple.datadetection/documentation/DataDetection/DataDetector/Match/SemanticDetails/PhoneNumber/label] property may contain a value suitable to populate a label when creating a contact.

## Components of a phone number

- **phoneNumber**: A string that contains the phone number the data detector found.
- **label**: An optional string that may contain a value suitable to populate a label when creating a contact.

## Conforms To

- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
